summary: Karaoke lyrics in Music, Apple Music access setup, and cleaner logging.

introduced: Music workspace shows synced karaoke lyrics from LRCLib while a track plays
Grant Music access card walks through Media & Apple Music and Music.app Automation permissions
changed: Music sidebar drops Quick Launch, playlists, and shortcuts in favor of the lyrics panel
Open Files button in the Music header for local audio playback
npm run logs, logs:all, and logs:network for easier Nucleus debugging
updated: Structured os.Logger output under net.suherman.nucleus for app log tailing
